description: Active Runs page — real-time monitoring dashboard for currently executing workflows with multi-run support, tabbed widget views, and event-driven updates

groups.name: Page Structure
groups.description: Core structural elements required for the Active Runs page: heading, control bar, tab bar, and content area.

assertions.description: The Active Runs page heading is rendered at the top of the page
A refresh button is present for manually triggering a status update
The tab bar for switching between Dashboard and widget views is present
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

groups.name: Tab Navigation
groups.description: The tab bar provides navigation between 9 views: Dashboard, Timeline, AI Conversation, Commands, UI Bridge, Verification, Findings, Flow, and Status.

assertions.description: Dashboard tab is present and selectable
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Timeline tab is present for viewing step execution progress
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: AI Conversation tab is present for viewing live AI output
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Commands tab is present for viewing command execution details
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: UI Bridge tab is present for viewing UI interaction logs
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Verification tab is present for viewing verification results
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Findings tab is present for viewing detected issues
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Flow tab is present for viewing flow execution details
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Status tab is present for viewing current run status
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

groups.name: Empty State
groups.description: When no workflows are currently running, the page should display an informative empty state message and the refresh button should remain functional.

assertions.description: An empty state message is shown when there are no active workflow runs
assertions.precondition: No workflows are currently running on any connected runner

assertions.description: The refresh button remains enabled even when there are no active runs, allowing users to check for new runs
The tab bar is not visible when no runs are active, since there is no data to display in widget views
assertions.precondition: No workflows are currently running on any connected runner

groups.name: Dashboard Layout
groups.description: When the Dashboard tab is active, the page shows a split layout with a primary widget on the left and summary cards on the right sidebar.

assertions.description: A primary widget is displayed in the main content area showing detailed execution data
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running and Dashboard tab is active

assertions.description: The active widget displays a heading with the widget name (using data-content-label='widget-heading')
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running and Dashboard tab is active

groups.name: Summary Cards
groups.description: The right sidebar displays clickable summary cards for detected execution widgets, each showing abbreviated status data.

assertions.description: Summary cards display widget names using data-content-label='widget-name' for identification
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running and Dashboard tab is active

assertions.description: Summary cards are interactive — clicking one expands it to the full widget view
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running and Dashboard tab is active

groups.name: Timeline Widget
groups.description: The Timeline widget shows step execution progress with step counts, progress bar, stage information, and current running step.

assertions.description: Step progress is displayed showing completed steps out of total (e.g. '3/10 steps')
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running with steps

assertions.description: When a run has not started executing steps, a waiting message is shown
assertions.precondition: A workflow is running but has not started executing steps yet

groups.name: AI Conversation Widget
groups.description: The AI Conversation widget displays session count, message count, user message count, a 'thinking' indicator, and a last-line preview of AI output.

assertions.description: AI session count is displayed (e.g. '1 session' or '2 sessions')
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is running with AI conversation active

assertions.description: AI message count is displayed (e.g. '5 msgs')
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is running with AI conversation active

assertions.description: When no AI messages exist, an empty state is shown
assertions.precondition: A workflow is running but the AI conversation has not started

groups.name: Verification Widget
groups.description: The Verification widget shows passed/failed verification counts and a progress bar indicating the pass rate.

assertions.description: Verification pass count is displayed (e.g. '4/5 passed')
assertions.precondition: A workflow has completed at least one verification phase

assertions.description: When no verification results exist, a placeholder message is shown
assertions.precondition: A workflow is running but has not reached verification phase

groups.name: Findings Widget
groups.description: The Findings widget shows total findings count, severity breakdown (critical, high), and uses data-content-label='findings-count' for the count metric.

assertions.description: Findings count metric is displayed with data-content-label='findings-count'
assertions.precondition: A workflow has detected at least one finding

assertions.description: When no findings exist, 'No issues found' status is displayed
assertions.precondition: A workflow is running with no findings detected

groups.name: Command Widget
groups.description: The Command widget shows total commands executed, failure count, and type breakdown (SH for shell, CHK for checks, TST for tests).

assertions.description: Command count is displayed (e.g. '3 commands')
assertions.precondition: A workflow has executed at least one command step

assertions.description: When no commands have been executed, a placeholder message is shown
assertions.precondition: A workflow is running but has not executed any command steps

groups.name: UI Bridge Widget
groups.description: The UI Bridge widget shows total UI Bridge actions, assertion pass counts, and the latest action name.

assertions.description: UI Bridge action count is displayed (e.g. '5 actions')
assertions.precondition: A workflow has executed at least one UI Bridge action

assertions.description: When no UI Bridge actions have been executed, a placeholder is shown
assertions.precondition: A workflow is running but has not executed any UI Bridge actions

groups.name: Run Progress Indicators
groups.description: When a workflow is running, the page displays status badges, phase information, and iteration count to indicate execution progress.

assertions.description: The current run status is displayed (running, completed, failed, or stopped)
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: The current execution phase is visible as a badge on the run card or status widget
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running with a phase set

target.label: Active run name with phase badge

groups.name: Multi-Run Selector
groups.description: When multiple workflows are running simultaneously, a horizontal run selector bar appears allowing users to switch between runs with clicks or keyboard shortcuts.

assertions.description: The ActiveRunsBar is visible when multiple runs are active, showing selectable run cards
assertions.precondition: Two or more workflows are running simultaneously

assertions.description: The ActiveRunsBar is hidden when only a single run is active to avoid unnecessary UI clutter
assertions.precondition: Exactly one workflow is currently running

target.label: Dashboard tab (run bar should be absent)

groups.name: Real-Time Updates
groups.description: The page uses event-driven updates via RunnerEventContext and fallback polling. Widgets update on events like task-run-update, orchestrator-state-change, ai-output, step-progress, finding_detected, and finding_resolved.

assertions.description: The page provides live real-time updates as workflows progress through execution phases, with widgets reflecting current state without manual refresh
When a workflow transitions to completed/failed/stopped status, the page automatically refreshes to show final results after a brief delay

groups.name: Page Purpose
groups.description: The Active Runs page is the real-time monitoring hub for running workflows. It provides a unified dashboard with tabbed widget views, multi-run support, keyboard navigation, and event-driven updates to track AI conversations, verification results, command execution, findings, and execution timeline.

assertions.description: Users can monitor all currently running workflows with live status updates across multiple execution dimensions (timeline, AI conversation, verification, findings, commands, UI bridge)
Users can monitor and switch between multiple concurrent workflow runs using a run selector bar with keyboard shortcuts (arrow keys, number keys, Ctrl+Tab)
Users can switch between specialized views (Dashboard, Timeline, AI Conversation, Commands, UI Bridge, Verification, Findings, Flow, Status) to focus on specific aspects of workflow execution
